name: Summer Shortcake
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 ounces frozen pound cake, thawed & cut into
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. In a small bowl, combine the honey and butter; mix well.
3. Brush half of the honey mixture over one side of each slice of cake and place coated side up on a baking sheet.
4. Broil for 3 to 5 minutes or until golden.
5. Carefully turn over the slices and brush the uncoated side with the remaining honey mixture.
6. Broil for 3 to 5 minutes or until heated through and golden.
7. Place on a large serving platter or individual serving plates and top each slice evenly with the whipped topping, strawberries, and blueberries.
